title: This stock will make you rich! Steyr Motors ISIN (AT0000A3FW25)
author: Alex150333344
selftext: I don't think you've ever heard of this stock! Yet it has such great potential. Steyr Motors (ISIN AT0000A3FW25) is a company that supplies patented engines to many defense contractors worldwide, giving them a significant competitive advantage. They manufacture patented engines for ships of the US Army and the German Armed Forces, among others. This stock stands to benefit most, especially in times of military buildup, as evidenced by its massive annual revenue growth. The cool thing about this stock is that there are only 2.96 million shares outstanding. This means that if all small investors buy these shares, the price will very quickly reach $1,000. You shouldn't miss out on this opportunity!
